title: Samhita Acacia Wood Rectangular Wooden Platters for Food Holder/BBQ/Party Buffet Gift for Friend, Family (Set of 2)
features: This rectangular serving Platter Perfect for serving meals, small snacks, fruit, desserts, bread, cakes, olives, sushi, cookies, or as a table decoration, you can also use it like serving tea, coffee, juice, or a dresser tray. Adds such an elegant feel to your home. these wooden Platter feature unique and natural colors and textures that are perfect for any decor.
Every wood platter is hand-finished by artisans, sourced from the highest quality 100% natural acacia wood
Our Rectangular Platter have raised edges to help prevent food from slipping or spilling, and are also easier to lift and carry, serving your favorite food in style.
To clean, wipe with damp fabric and towel dry, To preserve the beauty of the Acacia Wood, periodically apply oil with a fabric or towel and let dry long.

Packet Contain Two Platters First Platter Size (Inch) - 14" x 6" x 0.75" , Size (CM) - 35.56cm x 15.24cm x 1.90cm & Secound Platter Size (Inch) - 11" x 5" x 0.75", Size(CM) - 27.94cm x 12.7cm x 1.90cm
